item.title: Amazon is selling a heavy-duty sunshade canopy for only $27 that's UV-resistant
item.description: "This is holding up well after having been in the California sun for six months."

item.title: Costco takes big step to fix one of members’ biggest complaints
item.description: As a 20-year Costco member, there are clearly many things I love about the store. If I didn't, I wouldn't keep paying a membership fee year after year...

item.title: It's not just rising oil prices you'll have to worry about if Iran conflict continues

item.title: Walmart is selling a 40-drawer organizer for $27, and it's perfect for DIYers
